cases.prompt: Reify this with me: a pocket museum for ordinary objects.
I have a feeling about abandoned shopping malls, but I don't know whether it is an essay, installation, or product. Help me make it real.
Can we work back and forth on this rough thought until there is one thing I can actually make?
This keeps coming back to me, but every time I try to explain it I produce a different idea. Help me find what it wants to become.
I have scraps, references, and half a premise. Help me discover the one object they should become.
What year was the first lighthouse built at Cape Hatteras?
Write a TypeScript function that parses this JSON into a User object.
That movie was fun. I liked the ending.
Summarize this finished project plan in five bullets.
This unfinished project plan has three conflicting directions. Help me discover which one concrete outcome it should become.
